MESSAGE.value: WIP 03.09.26 What I've done: 1) I've written the client for grpc connection 2) Also I've written the grpc files
WIP 03.09.26 What I've done: 1)I've completed the writing of the master server 2)Also,I've regrouped a little bit the structure of the project(files and others)
WIP 03.13.26 What I've done: 1)Now server sends a packet to the Master server and decrypts it
WIP 03.17.26 What I've done(the stateful version): 1)Now server sends a packet to the Master server and decrypts it

WIP 03.17.26 What I've done(the stateful version): 1)I refactored interfaces 1.1) Auth interfaces has been break on small useful packs(like an example: Generator generates auth tokens) 1.2)KeyInteraction has been changed on the Crypto small logical blocks(like an example: the Decryption interface has all description methods. Despite the changes, all methods in the crypto have a logical name of an interface) 1.3) Also other interfaces have been changed like these
WIP 03.17.26 What I've done(the stateful version): 1)I've refactored all interfaces 2)And started adding realizations of interfaces in the main file
WIP 03.23.26 What I've done(the stateful version): 1)I've finished adding implements in the main file 2) I start fixing all micro bugs from the refactoring
WP 03.25.26 What I've done(the stateful version): 1)I've refactored the project
WP 03.26.26 What I've done(): I've added the keys interface which now manipulate a incoming keys
WP 03.28.26 What I've done: 1)I started refactoring some functions in controller 2) I finished refactoring Conroller
WP 03.30.26 What I've done: 1) I fixed a little bug which is associated with auth and UrlUploader
WP 04.01.26 What I've done: 1)I've fixed the bug which didn't allow to upload a file using the encryption mode
WP 04.04.26 What I've done: 1)I've moved logic of uploading and uploadingSecure into the interface
WP 04.04.26 What I've done: 1)I moved a half of logic with downloading to another file
WP 04.08.26 What I've done: 1)I already moved the logic downloading and downloading with secure
